domains.name: lending
domains.description: Loan origination, underwriting, disbursement, and repayment.

nouns.name: Borrower
nouns.description: A person or entity that applies for and receives a loan.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier.

attributes.name: annual_income
attributes.description: Stated annual income in base currency.

attributes.name: credit_score
attributes.description: Credit bureau score at time of application.

verbs.name: Register
verbs.description: A new borrower creates their profile.

verbs.name: Suspend
verbs.description: An admin suspends a borrower account.

nouns.name: Loan
nouns.description: A financial loan issued to a borrower with repayment terms.

attributes.name: borrower_id
attributes.description: Reference to the Borrower.

attributes.name: lender_id
attributes.description: Reference to the Lender that funds this Loan.

attributes.name: amount
attributes.description: Requested principal in base currency.

attributes.name: interest_rate
attributes.description: Annual interest rate as a decimal, set on approval.

attributes.name: term_months
attributes.description: Loan duration in months.

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: Stated purpose of the loan.

attributes.name: amount_paid
attributes.description: Running total of all repayments received.

attributes.name: due_date
attributes.description: Final date by which the loan must be fully repaid.

attributes.name: disbursed_at
attributes.description: Timestamp when funds were released to the borrower.

attributes.name: approved_at
attributes.description: Timestamp when the loan was approved.

attributes.name: reviewed_by
attributes.description: ID of the underwriter who reviewed the application.

verbs.name: Apply
verbs.description: A borrower submits a loan application.

verbs.name: Review
verbs.description: An underwriter opens an application for review.

verbs.name: Approve
verbs.description: An underwriter approves a loan application.

verbs.name: Reject
verbs.description: An underwriter rejects a loan application.

verbs.name: Disburse
verbs.description: Funds are released to the borrower after approval.

verbs.name: Repay
verbs.description: The borrower makes a repayment against the loan.

verbs.name: Default
verbs.description: The loan is marked as defaulted after the due date passes without full repayment.

nouns.name: Lender
nouns.description: An institution or entity that funds loans — e.g. a bank, credit union, private fund, or peer lender.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Legal or trading name of the lender.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Kind of lending institution.

attributes.name: license_number
attributes.description: Regulatory license or registration number.

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: Primary regulatory jurisdiction (e.g. country or state code).

attributes.name: email
attributes.description: Primary contact email.

attributes.name: phone
attributes.description: Primary contact phone number.

attributes.name: funding_capacity
attributes.description: Maximum aggregate funding the lender can commit, in base currency.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Whether the lender is currently authorized to fund new loans.

verbs.name: Onboard
verbs.description: Add a new lender to the platform.

verbs.name: Activate
verbs.description: Authorize the lender to fund new loans.

verbs.name: Deactivate
verbs.description: Pause the lender from funding new loans.

verbs.name: UpdateRates
verbs.description: Update the lender's posted interest rate schedule.

verbs.name: SetLimits
verbs.description: Set or update the lender's funding capacity and per-loan limits.

capabilities.name: Borrower.Register
capabilities.description: A new borrower creates their profile in the system.

capabilities.name: Borrower.Suspend
capabilities.description: An admin suspends a borrower, preventing new applications.

capabilities.name: Loan.Apply
capabilities.description: A borrower submits a loan application.

capabilities.name: Loan.Review
capabilities.description: An underwriter picks up an application for review.

capabilities.name: Loan.Approve
capabilities.description: An underwriter approves the loan and sets terms.

capabilities.name: Loan.Reject
capabilities.description: An underwriter rejects the loan application.

capabilities.name: Loan.Disburse
capabilities.description: Funds are disbursed to the borrower.

capabilities.name: Loan.Default
capabilities.description: The loan is marked as defaulted after passing its due date unpaid.

capabilities.name: Lender.Onboard
capabilities.description: A new lender is added to the platform.

capabilities.name: Lender.Activate
capabilities.description: A lender is authorized to fund new loans.

capabilities.name: Lender.Deactivate
capabilities.description: A lender is paused from funding new loans.

capabilities.name: Lender.UpdateRates
capabilities.description: A lender updates their posted interest rate schedule.

capabilities.name: Lender.SetLimits
capabilities.description: A lender's funding capacity or per-loan limits are set.

triggers.description: An admin manually suspends the borrower.
Borrower submits the loan application form.
Application enters the underwriting queue automatically after submission.
Underwriter approves the application from the review queue.
Underwriter rejects the application from the review queue.
Disbursement is initiated automatically once a loan is approved.
Borrower submits a repayment from their loan detail page.
Daily job checks all active loans and marks overdue ones as defaulted.

policies.description: Any unauthenticated user can register as a borrower.
Only authenticated borrowers may apply for a loan.
Only underwriters may open an application for review.
Only underwriters may approve a loan.
Only underwriters may reject a loan.
Disbursement is performed by the system only.
Only the borrower who owns the loan may submit a repayment.
Defaulting is performed by the system scheduler only.

rules.description: Borrower must have a complete financial profile before applying.
Only loans in under_review status can be picked up by an underwriter.
Loan must be under review and within the lender's maximum amount.
Only loans under review can be rejected.
Only approved loans can be disbursed.
Repayments can only be made on active loans.
Only active loans past their due date are eligible for default.

effects.description: Loan is approved and terms are locked in.
Loan becomes active and funds are marked as released.
Payment is recorded; loan is marked repaid if balance is cleared.

flows.description: The full loan origination and repayment lifecycle.

branches.description: Underwriter may reject instead of approve.
Active loan defaults if due date passes unpaid.
Admin may suspend the account at any point.
